pi_items.source: Task semantics align with standard Site Reliability Engineering and DevOps responsibilities for Kubernetes GitOps migrations.
setup_task.sh script and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce deployment and cleanup in this namespace.
verifier.py checks for the GitRepo resource specifically within the 'fleet-local' namespace.
verifier.py queries the Kubernetes API specifically for a GitRepo named 'guestbook-gitops'.
verifier.py explicitly checks that the GitRepo points to this URL. Web search confirmed this is an authentic, public Rancher repository for Fleet examples.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires migrating a synthetically generated 'legacy-frontend' workload to a Fleet GitOps deployment. It has been verified that the legacy workloads are injected via setup_task.sh into the 'webapp-prod' namespace. The target 'guestbook-gitops' GitRepo must be created in the 'fleet-local' namespace. The target GitOps repository (https://github.com/rancher/fleet-examples) has been verified via web search as a real, authentic public repository maintained by Rancher.
